name: Root-Glass Chapel

sensory_description.sight: Roots fused through old masonry around a shrine of polished black fragments and stolen candles.
sensory_description.sound: Whispering drafts moving through cracked hymn pipes.

notable_features: The Circle stores donor names here in coded liturgy.
A side chamber serves as a preparation room for sacrifices.
hidden_elements: Elira's final annotations scratched into the back of a pew.
A blood ledger linking the guild and the Circle.
plot_beats: Break the cult's pact with the ruin
Decide who carries the ledger into dawn
